evals.name: clear-emotion-anger
evals.prompt: 帮我把这句话录成一段生气的语音：'你可真行啊你！这事儿你也能干得出来？'保存到 /tmp/eval-out.mp3。
evals.expected_output: A .mp3 file at /tmp/eval-out.mp3 with angry/fast-paced delivery. The command should wrap the text with an anger marker like （生气） or （生气，语速快）.

assertions.text: Output file /tmp/eval-out.mp3 exists and is at least 3KB
The text passed to tts.js includes a Chinese-parenthesized anger marker like （生气） before the content
The command used node to invoke scripts/tts.js (the skill's tool) rather than hitting the API directly or using another TTS

evals.name: ambiguous-no-emotion-specified
evals.prompt: 把这段话读出来生成音频：'今天是个重要的日子，谢谢大家一路以来的支持。'
evals.expected_output: A .mp3 file with a suitable-for-context tone (e.g., 温柔/叙述/真诚). Agent may pick a reasonable emotion or ask for clarification; either is acceptable as long as a usable file is produced.

assertions.text: An .mp3 or .wav audio file is produced and is at least 3KB
The command used the skill's scripts/tts.js (node invocation) rather than another TTS tool

Agent's behavior is reasonable: either it picked a sensible tone (e.g., 温柔/真诚/叙述), or it first asked one short clarifying question about the desired vibe. It did NOT run with no emotion marker AND also not ask — that would indicate missed opportunity.

evals.name: dialect-northeastern
evals.prompt: 用东北话帮我念一下：'哎呀妈呀，这外头风刮得，脸都快冻掉了！'要带那种豪爽感。
evals.expected_output: A .mp3 file using a 东北 dialect marker.

assertions.text: Output audio file exists and is at least 3KB
The text passed to tts.js includes a 东北 dialect marker like （东北口音） or （东北话）, possibly combined with 豪爽

evals.name: singing
evals.prompt: 用唱的方式帮我合成这几句歌词，保存成 mp3：'我怎么变这样，变得这样倔强，每一步的地方，每一站都不会忘'
evals.expected_output: A .mp3 file generated using the <style>唱歌</style> tag.

assertions.text: Output .mp3 file exists and is at least 5KB
The text passed to tts.js includes <style>唱歌</style> tag
